title: Cobbled Pollen Puffs
description: Adds Pollen Puffs to the mod Cobblemon
body:
# Cobbled Pollen Puffs 
is a lightweight Minecraft **Server Side** mod that introduces new food items with unique effects, primarily centered around a custom status effect called Perfect Nutrition. These items are integrated into gameplay through crafting, Pokémon drops (for Cobblemon users), and status effect interactions.

## What it adds:
- Three new consumable items: Pollen Puff, Golden Pollen Puff, and Artificial Golden Pollen Puff
- A custom status effect, Perfect Nutrition, which temporarily increases the nutritional value of food while active
- Integration with Cobblemon: Pokémon such as Cutiefly and Ribombee can occasionally drop Pollen Puffs over time
- Custom models and textures using the Polymer API
- Shaped crafting recipes for creating puffs


IF BEING RAN ON SERVER PLEASE INSTALL THE [REQUIRED ASSETS](https://github.com/Hazar122/Cobbled-PollenPuffs/releases/tag/Fabric-1.21.1) TO YOUR SERVER PACK
